title: Schedule Planner
scenario: Plan a simple schedule for a single week. The schedule should include 3 events. The events should be formatted as a bullet-point list.
constraints: Must be under 200 characters per row

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the schedule meets the constraints of having 3 events and being under 200 characters per row.
Check if the schedule is formatted as a bullet-point list.
Check if each event includes the correct information.
